name: Founder OS HQ
description: Complete Notion workspace template for the Founder OS ecosystem. Consolidates all 30 plugin databases into 20 unified databases organized by functional area. Each database schema includes property definitions, default values, relation mappings, and plugin attribution notes. Use this template to provision a new Founder OS HQ workspace or to validate an existing installation.

companies.title: Founder OS HQ - Companies
companies.description: Central CRM hub for all client/company records. Enhanced with P10 Client Health Dashboard scoring properties and P20 Client Context Loader dossier caching. All client-facing databases relate back to this table.

Dossier.description: P20: Cached client context dossier (JSON format)

Dossier Generated At.description: P20: When dossier was last generated

Dossier Stale.description: P20: Whether dossier needs refresh (24h TTL)

Last Scanned.description: P10: When health score was last calculated (24h cache TTL)

companies.notes: Central hub of the Founder OS HQ workspace. All client-facing databases (Tasks, Meetings, Finance, Deliverables, Content, Research) link to Companies via Notion relations. P10 Client Health Dashboard writes health scoring properties directly to this database instead of a standalone Health Scores DB. P20 Client Context Loader writes dossier properties directly here instead of a standalone Client Dossiers DB. Both use 24h TTL caching. Discovery: plugins search for 'Founder OS HQ - Companies' first, then 'Companies'.

contacts.title: Founder OS HQ - Contacts
contacts.description: CRM contacts database for individual people/stakeholders associated with companies.
contacts.notes: Part of the CRM core. Company relation is bidirectional with the Companies DB. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Contacts' first, then 'Contacts' or 'CRM - Contacts'.

deals.title: Founder OS HQ - Deals
deals.description: Sales pipeline tracking with stage progression, probability scoring, and links to deliverables.
deals.notes: Part of the CRM core. Deliverables relation links to proposals, contracts, and SOWs generated by P12/P13/P14. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Deals' first, then 'Deals' or 'CRM - Deals'.

communications.title: Founder OS HQ - Communications
communications.description: Client communication activity log populated by CRM Sync Hub. Contains email and meeting records with AI-generated summaries, sentiment classification, and client associations. Created via lazy DB creation on first sync.

Title.description: AI-generated summary headline of the activity (max 80 characters).

Type.description: Activity type indicating the communication channel and direction.

Date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the activity occurred.

Contact.description: Related contact from the Contacts database.

Company.description: Related company from the Companies database.

Summary.description: AI-generated 2-3 sentence summary of the communication content.

Thread ID.description: Gmail Thread ID or Calendar Event ID for deduplication. Used as the unique key to prevent duplicate records.

Participants.description: Comma-separated list of participants in the format 'Name (Role)'.

Direction.description: Communication direction relative to the user.

Source.description: Source system the activity was synced from.

Synced At.description: Timestamp when the record was created or last updated by CRM Sync Hub.

communications.notes: The plugin searches for this database by name ('Founder OS HQ - Communications' first, then 'Communications' or 'CRM - Communications') before creating it (lazy creation). Title serves as part of the compound deduplication key (Title + Date + Type). If the Thread ID property exists, exact deduplication by Thread ID/Event ID is preferred over the compound key approach. Sentiment defaults to Neutral when AI classification is ambiguous.

tasks.title: Founder OS HQ - Tasks
tasks.description: Consolidated task database merging P01 Inbox Zero action items, P04 Action Item Extractor tasks, and P06 Follow-Up Tracker follow-ups. Each record has a Type column indicating its source.

Source Type.description: Where the task was extracted from

Days Waiting.description: P06: Days since follow-up was created

Thread ID.description: Gmail Thread ID for deduplication of email-sourced tasks

tasks.notes: Merged database for all task-like records. Plugins filter by Type when reading (e.g., P06 queries Type='Follow-Up'). Deduplication: P01 and P04 use Title + Source Title within their Type; P06 uses Thread ID. Company/Contact relations are populated when email domain or attendee info maps to a CRM record. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Tasks' first, then fall back to plugin-specific DB names ('Inbox Zero - Action Items', 'Action Item Extractor - Tasks', 'Follow-Up Tracker - Follow-Ups').

meetings.title: Founder OS HQ - Meetings
meetings.description: Consolidated meetings database merging P03 Meeting Prep Autopilot prep notes and P07 Meeting Intelligence Hub analyses. A single meeting record holds both prep and analysis data, linked by Event ID.

Event ID.description: Google Calendar Event ID, idempotent key shared between P03 and P07

Company.description: Optional: associated company for external meetings

Sources Used.description: P03: Data sources used for prep

Transcript File.description: P07: Path to saved transcript file

meetings.notes: Both P03 and P07 share the Event ID as idempotent key. When P03 creates a record for prep, P07 updates the same record with analysis fields (and vice versa). Company relation populated when meeting attendees match CRM contacts. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Meetings' first, then fall back to 'Meeting Prep Autopilot - Prep Notes' or 'Meeting Intelligence Hub - Analyses'.

finance.title: Founder OS HQ - Finance
finance.description: Consolidated financial records merging P11 Invoice Processor invoices and P16 Expense Report Builder expense reports. Each record has a Type column (Invoice or Expense).

Line Items.description: P11: JSON array of invoice line items (invoices only)

Date Range.description: P16: Report date range (expense reports only)

finance.notes: P16 reads from this DB filtered by Type='Invoice' (replacing the old P11-specific 'Invoice Processor - Invoices' DB read). P16 writes expense report summaries to the Reports DB, not here. Company relation links vendors to CRM for automatic vendor tracking. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Finance' first, then fall back to 'Invoice Processor - Invoices'.

briefings.title: Founder OS HQ - Briefings
briefings.description: Consolidated briefings database merging P02 Daily Briefings, P05 Weekly Reviews, P19 Slack Digests, and P22 Morning Sync briefings. Each record has a Type column.

Date.description: Primary date for idempotent upsert (combined with Type)

Meeting Count.description: Number of meetings in the period

Email Count.description: Number of emails in the period

Sources Used.description: Data sources used for this briefing

Week Ending.description: P05: Week ending date for weekly reviews

Carryover Items.description: P05: Tasks carried to next week

Next Week Priorities.description: P05: Recommended priorities for next week

briefings.notes: Idempotent upsert uses Date + Type as compound key (e.g., one Daily Briefing per day, one Weekly Review per Week Ending date). P05 Weekly Review uses Week Ending as its date key. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Briefings' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.

knowledge_base.title: Founder OS HQ - Knowledge Base
knowledge_base.description: Consolidated knowledge base merging P23 Knowledge Base Q&A sources and queries. Type column distinguishes indexed sources from user queries.

Answered.description: Whether query was successfully answered (queries only)

Indexed At.description: When source was indexed or query was asked

knowledge_base.notes: Merges P23's two databases (Sources and Queries) into one with Type column. Sources are idempotent by URL. Queries are idempotent by Title (query text) + same calendar day. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Knowledge Base' first, then fall back to 'Knowledge Base Q&A - Sources' and 'Knowledge Base Q&A - Queries'.

research.title: Founder OS HQ - Research
research.description: Consolidated research database merging P08 Newsletter Engine research sessions and P15 Competitive Intel Compiler research entries.
research.notes: P15 Competitive Analysis entries should have Company relation populated (create or find company in Companies DB). P08 entries are idempotent by Topic + same calendar day. P15 entries are idempotent by Company Name. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Research' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.

reports.title: Founder OS HQ - Reports
reports.description: Consolidated reports database merging P09 Report Generator business reports and P25 Time Savings Calculator ROI reports.

Total Hours Saved.description: P25: Total hours saved by automation

Dollar Value.description: P25: Dollar value of time saved

Tasks Automated.description: P25: Number of automated tasks counted

Active Plugins.description: P25: Number of active plugins detected

reports.notes: P09 writes Type='Business Report', P25 writes Type='ROI Report'. P16 Expense Report Builder also writes here with Type='Expense Report' (note: P16's expense REPORT output is a report document, distinct from the Finance DB invoice/expense records). Idempotent by Title + same calendar day. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Reports' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.

content.title: Founder OS HQ - Content
content.description: Consolidated content database merging P08 Newsletter Draft Engine newsletter drafts, P24 LinkedIn Post Generator posts, and P01 Inbox Zero email drafts.

Title.description: Post topic, email subject, or newsletter title

Style Notes.description: P24: Style guidance or voice notes

content.notes: P01 Inbox Zero writes email drafts with Type='Email Draft' and Status lifecycle: To Review -> Approved -> Sent to Gmail. P08 writes newsletters with Type='Newsletter'. P24 writes LinkedIn posts with Type='LinkedIn Post'. Company relation is populated when content is related to a specific client. Idempotent: P24 by Post Topic + Framework + same calendar day; P08 by Topic + same calendar day; P01 by email subject. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Content' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.

deliverables.title: Founder OS HQ - Deliverables
deliverables.description: Consolidated deliverables database merging P12 Proposal Automator proposals, P13 Contract Analyzer contract analyses, and P14 SOW Generator statements of work.

Title.description: Project title, contract name, or SOW title

Brief File.description: P12/P14: Path to the brief file used

deliverables.notes: P12 Proposal Automator writes Type='Proposal' with Company relation from client name lookup and optional Deal relation. P13 Contract Analyzer writes Type='Contract' with Company relation when contract parties match CRM. P14 SOW Generator writes Type='SOW' with Company + Deal relations. The Deals DB has a reverse relation to Deliverables. Idempotent: by Title + Company (case-insensitive). Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Deliverables' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.

prompts.title: Founder OS HQ - Prompts
prompts.description: Stores reusable AI prompts with categories, variable templates, usage tracking, and Personal/Shared visibility for team collaboration.

Name.description: Unique prompt name for retrieval (e.g., 'Client Onboarding Email', 'Code Review Checklist')

Content.description: Full prompt text with optional {{variable}} placeholders for interactive substitution

Category.description: Prompt category for filtering and organization. Custom categories can be added.

Variables.description: Comma-separated list of {{variable}} names detected in the prompt content (e.g., 'client_name, project, deadline')

Visibility.description: Access control: Personal (only creator) or Shared (visible to team). Defaults to Personal on creation.

Times Used.description: Usage counter incremented each time the prompt is retrieved via /prompt:get

Author.description: Name of the person who added the prompt

Tags.description: Optional tags for cross-category search and discovery (e.g., 'onboarding', 'weekly', 'client-facing')

Created At.description: Timestamp when the prompt was first added to the library

Last Used.description: Timestamp of the most recent retrieval via /prompt:get

prompts.notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /prompt:add. Idempotent upsert by Name property (case-insensitive match). Times Used starts at 0 and increments on each /prompt:get retrieval. Visibility defaults to Personal; changed to Shared via /prompt:share. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Prompts' first, then 'Team Prompt Library - Prompts'.

goals.title: Founder OS HQ - Goals
goals.description: Stores goals with progress tracking, RAG health status, milestone rollup, velocity-based completion projections, and blocker detection.

Title.description: Goal name as provided by the user

Description.description: Detailed description of the goal including success criteria

Status.description: Current lifecycle status of the goal

Progress.description: Overall progress 0-100. Auto-calculated from milestones when present, or manually set via /goal:update.

Start Date.description: When work on the goal began. Defaults to creation date.

Category.description: Goal category for grouping and filtering

RAG Status.description: Red/Amber/Green health indicator. Auto-calculated by comparing actual vs expected progress.

Projected Completion.description: Estimated completion date based on current velocity. Updated on each /goal:report or /goal:check.

Milestone Count.description: Total number of milestones linked to this goal

Completed Milestones.description: Number of milestones marked as Done

Progress Snapshots.description: JSON array of {date, progress} objects for velocity calculation fallback when no milestones exist. E.g. [{"date":"2026-03-01","progress":25}]

Notes.description: Append-only log of status updates, blocker notes, and context. Each entry prefixed with [YYYY-MM-DD].

Created At.description: Timestamp when the goal was created

goals.notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /goal:create. Idempotent upsert by Title to prevent duplicate goals. Progress auto-calculated from milestones when Milestone Count > 0. Progress Snapshots stored as JSON rich_text for velocity fallback on goals without milestones. Notes are append-only -- never overwrite, always prepend new entries. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Goals' first, then 'Goal Progress Tracker - Goals'.

milestones.title: Founder OS HQ - Milestones
milestones.description: Stores milestones as sub-goals linked to parent goals via relation property. Milestone completion drives automatic goal progress calculation.

Title.description: Milestone name describing the deliverable or checkpoint

Goal.description: Link to the parent goal. Goals DB must be created before Milestones DB.

Due Date.description: Target completion date for this milestone

Completed At.description: Actual completion date. Set automatically when Status changes to Done.

Order.description: Sequence number (1-based) for display ordering within the goal

Notes.description: Optional context or completion notes for this milestone

Created At.description: Timestamp when the milestone was created

milestones.notes: Lazy creation by database name on first milestone addition. Requires Goals DB to exist first for the relation property. Milestone completion (Status = Done) triggers parent goal progress recalculation. Skipped milestones are excluded from progress calculation. Order field determines display sequence in reports and dashboards. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Milestones' first, then 'Goal Progress Tracker - Milestones'.

learnings.title: Founder OS HQ - Learnings
learnings.description: Stores daily learning insights with auto-detected topics, source classification, and cross-references to related past learnings.

Title.description: Auto-generated 5-8 word summary of the learning insight

Insight.description: Full learning text as provided by the user (15-2000 characters)

Topics.description: Auto-detected topic categories (1-3 per learning). 10 predefined + custom topics allowed.

Source Type.description: How the learning was acquired. Auto-detected from context or specified via --source flag.

Context.description: Optional additional context provided via --context flag

Related IDs.description: Comma-separated page IDs of 2-3 most related past learnings (stored as rich_text for lazy-creation compatibility)

Related Titles.description: Comma-separated titles of related past learnings for quick scanning

Week.description: ISO week identifier as YYYY-WNN text (e.g., '2026-W10') for weekly aggregation queries

Logged At.description: Timestamp when the learning was captured

learnings.notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /learn:log. Idempotent upsert by Title + same calendar day to allow multiple distinct learnings per day but prevent accidental duplicates. Related IDs/Titles stored as rich_text (not Notion relation type) for lazy-creation compatibility. Week field enables ISO week queries for /learn:weekly synthesis. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Learnings' first, then 'Learning Log Tracker - Learnings'.

weekly_insights.title: Founder OS HQ - Weekly Insights
weekly_insights.description: Stores synthesized weekly learning summaries with theme analysis, streak tracking, and trend comparison to previous weeks.

Week.description: ISO week identifier as YYYY-WNN (e.g., '2026-W10'). Used as primary key for upsert.

Summary.description: Narrative 3-5 sentence synthesis of the week's learnings, themes, and notable patterns

Top Themes.description: 2-4 most frequent topic categories from the week's learnings

Learning Count.description: Total number of learnings logged during this week

Most Active Topic.description: Single topic with highest frequency for the week

Key Connections.description: Prose identifying 2-3 cross-learning patterns where insights from different topics reinforce or contrast each other

Learnings List.description: Scannable bulleted index of all learning titles logged during the week

Streak Days.description: Consecutive weeks with at least one learning logged, calculated by backwards scan until gap

Vs Last Week.description: Trend comparison using 20% threshold: More active (>20% increase), Same pace (within +/-20%), Less active (>20% decrease)

Source Mix.description: Breakdown of learning sources for the week (e.g., 'Experience: 3, Reading: 2, Conversation: 1')

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the weekly synthesis was generated or last updated

weekly_insights.notes: Lazy creation by database name on first /learn:weekly. Idempotent upsert by Week title to prevent duplicate weekly entries. Streak Days recalculated from scratch on each run by scanning backwards through Weekly Insights until finding a week gap. Vs Last Week compares Learning Count to prior week using 20% thresholds. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Weekly Insights' first, then 'Learning Log Tracker - Weekly Insights'.

workflows.title: Founder OS HQ - Workflows
workflows.description: Consolidated workflows database merging P27 Workflow Automator execution logs and P28 Workflow Documenter SOPs. Type column distinguishes execution records from SOP documents.

Workflow Version.description: Execution: version of the workflow definition

Context Snapshot.description: Execution: JSON snapshot of context variables

Tools Used.description: SOP: Tools referenced in the procedure

SOP File Path.description: SOP: Path to saved SOP file

Diagram Included.description: SOP: Whether Mermaid diagram was generated

workflows.notes: P27 writes Type='Execution' with Run ID as the idempotent key (UUID). P28 writes Type='SOP' idempotent by Title + same calendar day. Status values are shared but used differently: Executions use Running/Completed/Failed/Cancelled; SOPs use Draft/Published. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Workflows' first, then fall back to 'Workflow Automator - Executions' or 'Workflow Documenter - SOPs'.

activity_log.title: Founder OS HQ - Activity Log
activity_log.description: Tracks Google Drive operations performed via /drive:search, /drive:summarize, /drive:ask, and /drive:organize commands for usage analytics and result caching.

Query.description: The search query, question, or folder path used in the command

Files Found.description: Number of files found or processed by the command

Top Result.description: Title or name of the top/primary result file

File IDs.description: Comma-separated Google Drive file IDs of processed files

Folder Context.description: Folder path or scope context for the operation

Sources Used.description: Which data sources were accessed during the operation

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the operation was performed

activity_log.notes: Idempotent by Query text (case-insensitive) + same calendar day: update if found, create if not. Activity tracking is optional and only writes when Notion is available. The /drive:organize command logs recommendations but never executes file moves. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Activity Log' first, then 'Google Drive Brain - Activity'.
